positive: A stylized, symmetrical mandala featuring celestial botanicals, glowing crescent moons, stylized ferns, and interconnected constellations. The design must have a strong, clean black silhouette set against a deep midnight indigo background. Incorporate subtle gradients of violet and teal for depth. Style should be a mix of Art Deco geometry and delicate bioluminescent etching. Central composition, high contrast, clean edges, print-friendly vectorial look. Seamless repeat pattern potential, suitable for apparel print.
